markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content workflow, strategy, and technical implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Workflow:** GrowthX will publish articles directly to Webflow drafts. Surge AI will review and approve, prioritizing speed to capture SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Ramp-Up Plan:** Start with 5 articles next week, ramping to 30–50/week. The initial focus is rewriting existing blog posts, as they are unblocked by new site development.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Technical Path:** A Webflow URL conflict (`/blog/categories/`) requires a new structure. The proposed solution is a separate `/career` collection for evergreen content, keeping the main `/blog` for brand-focused posts.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Ghostwrite articles under DA worker names to build author authority. Launch a Reddit strategy (monitoring, seeding, link building) to engage the platform's active community.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Approval

  - [**Tools:** Airtable for content strategy (topics, keywords), Notion for docs.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Approval Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize publishing speed over pre-approval.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The cost of a post-publish correction is low; the opportunity cost of delaying SEO indexing is high.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [**Exception:** Surge AI will scan brand-sensitive articles (e.g., "Is DA a scam?") before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**Initial Feedback:** The first two articles ("Is DA a scam?" and "Work-life balance") confirmed the workflow's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**"Is DA a scam?":** Received many edits, as expected for a brand-sensitive topic.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**"Work-life balance":** Received few edits, validating the general content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [**Platform:** Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**URL Conflict:** Webflow's URL structure prevents the desired path: `/blog/categories/blog-detail`.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a separate `/career` collection for evergreen content (e.g., interview guides). This keeps brand-focused posts on the main `/blog` path.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Publishing Process:** GrowthX will upload articles to Webflow drafts for Surge AI review.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Image Generation:** GrowthX will create meta images; Surge AI will provide brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Strategy & Ramp-Up

  - [**Initial Focus:** Rewrite existing blog posts, as this work is unblocked by new site development.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Ramp-Up Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Week 1:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Evaluate performance → ramp to 20 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reach 30–50 articles/week to cover the large keyword cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**Performance Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**SEO:** A long-term channel. Expect 3–4 weeks for initial traffic and 4–6 months for top rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Forecasting:** GrowthX will provide a forecast mapping the keyword cluster to projected signups.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

### Author Authority & Reddit Strategy

  - [**Author Authority:** Ghostwrite articles under DA worker names to build author authority, a key SEO signal.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Track relevant subreddits for questions to answer.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [**Seeding:** Post content to Reddit to aid Google ranking and AI prompt training.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [**Discussion:** Use vendors to seed discussions and build momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Engage Reddit's active community, a platform where Surge AI has a strong organic presence.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

### Performance Metrics & Analytics

  - [**Current Scale:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Total Signups:** \~500k–600k/month (global, all categories).](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Coder Signups:** Data to be pulled.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [**Approved Coders:** \~3–4k all-time.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
      - [**CPA (Approved Coder):** \~$3k–$4k.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [**Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**GA4:** Surge AI will revive its GA4 instance.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Rationale:** GrowthX's internal tracking tool requires GA4 to connect with Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Amplitude:** Available for additional data.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**SimilarWeb:** Jason S. can run reports on request.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Update the PRD with the new `/career` URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Provide a forecast for signups from the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [Share details on the Reddit strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Surge AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Provide Webflow access for draft publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Provide brand guidelines for image creation.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Revive and grant access to the GA4 instance.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [Pull and share data on coder signups.](https://fathom.video/share/heCEbosMyyF695zSsxaUYsQpN8SzmzH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
